title: pabstiella nummularia
intro: Pabstiella nummularia, also known as the nummularia orchid, is a type of epiphytic orchid species native to tropical forests in Central and South America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Pabstiella nummularia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pabstiella nummularia is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
